item.text: I’ll run turn 020 with Smithy to keep the engine draw high and buy Gold if legal. On board, this is a good cleanup turn: the wounded raider can kill the 6 HP raider, while the two other raiders converge to remove the 8 HP raider on `center-center`.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
DECK_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-020.deck.json
BOARD_ACTION=$RUN/actions/turn-020.board.json
DECK_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-020.deck.result.json
BOARD_RESULT=$RUN/results/turn-020.board.result.json
WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-020.win-events.json
TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS=$RUN/actions/turn-020.terminal-win-events.json

cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-020\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"gold\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-020\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"buyCard\",\"cardId\":\"peddler\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state "$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$DECK_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-020\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":0},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$DECK_ACTION" --result "$DECK_RESULT"
  fi
fi

cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-020\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":6}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-020-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON

if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
  cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-020\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-020-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":0,\"row\":8}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
  if "'! bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state "$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"; then
    cat > "$BOARD_ACTION" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-020\",\"player\":\"P2\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":6},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P2-raider-turn-018-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":1,\"row\":8},\"to\":{\"col\":4,\"row\":7}}],\"recruits\":[],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-014-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P2-raider-turn-016-1\",\"target\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"deckDamage\":0}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
    bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --actions "$BOARD_ACTION" --result "$BOARD_RESULT"
  fi
fi

SUMMARY="P2 played Smithy, bought Gold, used the wounded raider to kill the damaged P1 raider, collapsed two raiders onto the center raider, and recruited another raider."
REASONING="Smithy digs through the strong economy deck and Gold remains the best buy. On board, P2 can convert damaged front units into kills: the 2 HP raider removes the 6 HP target, two healthy raiders combine into the center raider, and a fresh recruit maintains pressure from home."

COMMIT_LOG=$(mktemp)
if ! bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win >"$COMMIT_LOG" 2>&1; then
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
  if grep -q "winEvents'"\\|terminalWinEvents\" \""'$COMMIT_LOG"; then
    python3 - "$COMMIT_LOG" "$WIN_EVENTS" "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" <<'"'PY'
import json, sys
log=open(sys.argv[1]).read()
def extract(label):
    i=log.find(label)
    if i<0: return None
    j=log.find('[', i)
    if j<0: return None
    depth=0
    for k in range(j, len(log)):
        if log[k]=='[': depth+=1
        elif log[k]==']':
            depth-=1
            if depth==0:
                return json.loads(log[j:k+1])
for label,path in [('winEvents',sys.argv[2]),('terminalWinEvents',sys.argv[3])]:
    arr=extract(label)
    if arr is not None:
        open(path,'w').write(json.dumps(arr,separators=(',',':'))+'\\n')
PY
    EXTRA=()
    [ -s \""'$WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--win-events "$WIN_EVENTS")
    [ -s "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS" ] && EXTRA+=(--terminal-win-events "$TERMINAL_WIN_EVENTS")
    bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$DECK_RESULT" --board-result "$BOARD_RESULT" --summary "$SUMMARY" --reasoning "$REASONING" --strict-win "${EXTRA[@]}"
  else
    exit 1
  fi
else
  cat "$COMMIT_LOG"
fi
rm -f "$COMMIT_LOG"

bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win "$RUN/timeline.json"

node - <<'"'NODE'
const fs=require('fs');
const da=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-020.deck.json','utf8'));
const ba=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided/actions/turn-020.board.json','utf8'));
console.log('DECK_LINE', JSON.stringify(da.actions));
console.log('BOARD_LINE', JSON.stringify(ba.actions));
console.log('RATIONALE Smithy digs through the economy deck and buys Gold. The wounded raider cashes in for a kill, two healthy raiders collapse onto the center raider, and another recruit keeps P2 ahead on board pressure.');
NODE"

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-020`.

Deck line: Smithy, move to buy, buy Gold, end turn.

Board line: `P2-raider-turn-016-1` moved to `(5,5)` and attacked `P1-raider-turn-015-1`; `P2-raider-turn-018-1` advanced to `(4,7)`; recruited `P2-raider-turn-020-1` at `(0,8)`; wounded `P2-raider-turn-014-1` attacked `P1-raider-turn-013-1`.

Rationale: Smithy digs through the economy deck and buys Gold. The wounded raider converts into a kill on the damaged target, the healthy raider damages the center raider, and P2 keeps reinforcing with another raider.
